questions.question: What body of water did Trans-Siberian railway workers need five years to construct a loop around?
What future Oscar-winning actor played Alex Keaton's alcoholic uncle on Family Ties?
What former California clergyman claimed to be an incarnation of Jesus and Lenin?
What chemist concluded in 1864 that micro-organisms existed in French air?
What did St. Louis baseballer Joe Medwick describe himself as when he met the Pope?
What did columnist Liz Smith define as "news running ahead of itself in a red satin dress"?
